subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest me clinging to the cord of Thy bounty and holding fast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی ترانی متمسکا بحبل عطائک و متشبثا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
